title: eriophyton oblongatum
intro: Eriophyton oblongatum is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, commonly known as the mint family, and is native to the tropical regions of India and Sri Lanka. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Eriophyton oblongatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or oil, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
